title: Hobby Gift Exclusive Medium Sewing Craft Hobby Storage Box, Accessories Tray Pin Cushion Pocket PVC Handle Embroidered Lid 18.5 x 25.5 x 14.5cm, Hydrangea
features: [Dimensions] This sewing box is size Medium. External dimensions d/w/h: 18.5 x 25.5 x 14.5cm.

[Internal Plastic Tray] Each storage box comes with a removable clear acrylic plastic tray for keeping small items neatly organised above, still allowing for larger items such as dressmaking shears to be stored underneath.
[Pivot Point Handle] Each box comes with a smooth action pivot point faux raffia cord handle, colour coordinated to compliment the unique fabric designs.

[Stay Organised] Ideal storage solution for keeping sewing notions such as pins, needles, scissors, snips, tape measures etc, neat, tidy and free from getting lost. Complete with an elasticated pocket and pin cushion integrated into the inside of the lid.

[Lightweight and Portable] Made from a lightweight wooden construction covered in strong, hard-wearing fabric with a coordinating soft satin feel lining inside, magnetic press fastener closure with fabric cover and a faux raffia cord handle.
description: From the manufacturer These fabric covered storage boxes are versatile for a range of storage needs such as sewing, crafting, knitting, drawing, makeup, and beauty essentials and more. The internal dimensions are capable of accommodating small lotions, tubs, creams and bottles, helping to organise cluttered vanity dressers. *Some designs feature embroidery and applique detailing. Check product listing for details. Each box comes with a removable clear plastic tray insert, perfect for sorting and organizing small haberdashery items like needles, threads, pins, spare buttons and fasteners. When repurposed for beauty storage, this tray is perfect for organizing your most-used items like spoolies, brushes, hairgrips, ties and eye-shadows, ensuring they're neatly arranged and easily accessible. The cotton fabric lid lining features an attached pin cushion and elasticated pocket, perfect for storing seam rippers, crochet hooks, snips, and more. It doubles as a keepsake storage box; the elasticated pocket is ideal for holding important cuttings or photos, while the pin cushion securely attaches friendship bracelets or scrunchies using safety pins. Small Dimensions: (d/w/h) 20 x 20 x 11cm. Medium Dimensions: (d/w/h) 18.5 x 25.5 x 14.5cm Large Dimensions: (d/w/h) 23.5 x 31 x 20cm Novelty Dimensions vary between design. Check product listing and images for details. Twin Lid variation Double opening lid featuring an internal pin cushion and elasticated storage pocket for smaller notions and accessories Customise your work setup by choosing to have 1 or 2 lids open while crafting, offering flexibility and convenience. Featuring a removable, clear plastic accessories tray that can be easily detached for use as a neat organisational space on your workspace. Deep, cotton-lined interior capable of accommodating dressmaking shears, cotton reels, and more, ensuring ample storage space for various crafting supplies. Double handles for effortless transportation and smooth metal pivot points for added durability. Available in select fabric options, as well as the Hamper style with faux wicker detailing and faux raffia handles. Dimensions (d/w/h) 25 x 25 x 17cm providing a compact yet spacious storage solution for your essentials.
